feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Label in F4 is not getting displayed for the fiori local annotations
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a value help using local annotations for my custom fiori application. Below is the code 

            <Annotations Target="Odata.PO_Self_Service_HomePage/POStatus">
                <Annotation Term="Common.ValueList">
                    <Record Type="Common.ValueListType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Parameters">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterInOut">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="POStatus" />
                                    <PropertyValue Property="LocalDataProperty" PropertyPath="POStatus" />
                                </Record>
                                <Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterDisplayOnly">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="Description"/>
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="CollectionPath" String="ZPOStatusValueHelp" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="SearchSupported" Bool="true" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="valueHelp" />
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
 
Issue is i dont see the PO status label in the output but strangely i could see the description. 

But the same i could see in the top to search. what is that i am missing here ? 

KR,

Anji

entry.title: Issue with UploadSetwithTable - Unsupported Media Type (415) in RAP (S/4HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am working on a RAP-based application in S/4HANA Public Cloud where I need to attach multiple files and upload them using the UploadSetwithTable control.

However, I am encountering the following error during upload:

Error Response:

{
"message": "The server is refusing to process the request because the entity has an unsupported format"
}

HTTP Status: 415 (Unsupported Media Type)

Implementation Details:-

My Fragment code: 

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns:f="sap.f" xmlns:upload="sap.m.upload">
   
    <Dialog id="uploadDialog" title="Upload File" draggable="true" resizable="true" contentWidth="50%" contentHeight="50%">
        <content>
            <Table id="table-uploadSet"
                inset="true"
                autoPopinMode="true"
                hiddenInPopin="None"
                items="{path: 'attachmentModel>/Attachment', templateShareable: false}">
                <headerToolbar>
                    <OverflowToolbar>
                        <Title text="Documents" level="H2" />
                        <ToolbarSpacer />
                        <ToolbarSeparator />
                        <upload:ActionsPlaceholder id="uploadButton" placeholderFor="UploadButtonPlaceholder" />
                    </OverflowToolbar>
                </headerToolbar>

                <dependents>
                    <plugins.UploadSetwithTable
                        id="uploadSet"
                        uploadUrl="/path"
                        multiple="true"
                        beforeUploadStarts=".onBeforeUploadStarts"
                        uploadCompleted=".onUploadCompleted"
                        cloudFilePickerEnabled="true"
                        actions="uploadButton">
                        <rowConfiguration>
                            <upload.UploadItemConfiguration
                                fileNamePath="Filename"
                                mediaTypePath="Mimetype"
                                urlPath="url"
                                previewablePath="previewable"
                                fileSizePath="fileSize"
                                isTrustedSourcePath="trustedSource"/>
                        </rowConfiguration>
                    </plugins.UploadSetwithTable>
                </dependents>

                <columns>
                    <Column id="fileName" importance="High">
                        <header>
                            <Label text="File Name" />
                        </header>
                    </Column>
                    <Column id="actionButton" importance="High" />
                </columns>  

                <items>
                    <ColumnListItem>
                        <cells>
                            <Text text="{attachmentModel>Filename}" />
                            <Button type="Transparent" icon="sap-icon://decline" press="onRemoveHandler"/>
                        </cells>
                    </ColumnListItem>
                </items>
            </Table>
        </content>
        <endButton>
            <Button text="Close" type="Transparent" press="onCloseFileUploadDialog"/>
        </endButton>
    </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

Controller code: 

onBeforeUploadStarts: function (oEvent) {
            var oUploadSet = oEvent.getSource();           
            var oItem = oEvent.getParameter("item"); // Get the item inside mParameters

            var oModel = this.getView().getModel("zmm_sd_pr_atch");
            var csrfToken = oModel.getHttpHeaders()["X-CSRF-Token"];
 
            var sContentType = oItem.getMediaType() || "application/octet-stream";
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "x-csrf-token", text: csrfToken })
            );
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "slug", text: oItem.getFileName() })
            );
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "Content-Type", text: sContentType  })
            );
},
onUploadCompleted: function (oEvent) {
            var iResponseStatus = oEvent.getParameter("status");
       
            if (iResponseStatus === 201) {  // Check if upload is successful
                this.getView().getModel("zmm_sd_pr_atch").refresh(true);
                MessageToast.show("Document Added Successfully");
            } else {
                MessageToast.show("File upload failed.");
            }
        },
 

Any guidance on proper request formatting would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Business Application Studio - modules not recognized anymore in typescript/javascript files
entry.content:
Hello,

Since few days, in all typescript/javascript files of all projects, links to module (import or require) are broken. By consequence, there is no syntax check or auto completion anymore. However, the projects still works perfectly so I suppose it's about some configuration in Business Application Studio.

This issue appeared right after the activation of Joule. I'm not sure if it's linked or not.

I tested the same projects in VSCode and all works fine.

To be sure, I created a new dev space in BAS and started a new CAP project from template and I have the same behavior.

Example:

This is my implementation in x-service.ts file.

  • xxxxx does not exist however I don't have any syntax check (red highlighted error)
  • when I do ctrl + click on @SAP/cds nothing happen
  • when I do ctrl + click on ./element I get "file not found" despite the file exists
import cds from '@sap/cds';
import { Service } from '@sap/cds';
import { xxxxxx } from '#cds-models/XService'
import Element from './element';

export default (srv: Service) => {

}
 

This is my x-service.cds file.

service XService {
    entity Stuff {
        name: String;
    }
}
 

This is the element.ts file:

export default class Element {
    
}
 

If I remove the faulty xxxxx import and I start the project everything works fine.
But it's annoying when you have a big project to work without auto completion and syntax check.

What's wrong ? Did you face the same issue ?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Business Application Studio - modules not recognized...
entry.content:
Hello.

I’m facing a similar issue to yours. My CDS files have working autocompletion and syntax checking, but when I create a SAPUI5 project with TypeScript inside the CAP project, the syntax checking and autocompletion in my SAPUI5 Project no longer work. I’ve also tried creating a new Dev Space, but the problem persists.

Have you found a solution yet?

entry.title: How to connect and test CAP application locally with destinations using hybrid profile?
entry.content:
Hello supporters,
I do not want to deploy and test application, as developer, I would like to test app locally before push.
Running hybrid profile worked but returned empty array.

Why it shows empty array to me? What did I miss?

I am using Business Application Studio - BAS

It works in Postman.

cds watch --profile hybrid
cds serve all --with-mocks --in-memory? --profile hybrid 
live reload enabled for browsers
resolving cloud service bindings...
bound destinations to Cloud Foundry managed service opps-mta-destination:opps--destination-key
bound auth to Cloud Foundry managed service opps-mta-xsuaa:opps-mta-xsuaa-key
----
[cds] - mocking OPPS_DataAccessV4 { path: '/odata/v4/opps-data-access-v4' }
[cds] - server listening on { url: 'http://localhost:4004' }
----

 

Update: 
Is there anything wrong in my Run Configuration?

Why I don't see Live Data option also?  based on Run Config documentation.

Step 1 try: 

I turned the option to -> "Mock external OData services (Off)"

[cds] - connect to db > sqlite {url: ':memory:'}
/> successfully deployed to in-memory database. 
Process exited with code 1
Error: No credentials configured for "OPPS_DataAccessV4".
    at RemoteService.init (/home/user/projects/opps-promotions-api-mta/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/Service.js:223:13)

When clicked on 3rd option "OPPS_DataAccessV4 - OData" in order to Bind it, then got strange error:

Step 2 try:

I turned the option to ->  "Mock external OData services (On)" and I got error:

Process exited with code 1
[cds] - using auth strategy {kind: 'xsuaa', impl: 'node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/auth/jwt-auth'} 
Error: Authentication kind "xsuaa" configured, but no XSUAA instance bound to application. Either bind an XSUAA instance, or switch to an authentication kind that does not require a binding.

How to fix this?

We really need to solve this. Please support, Thanks.

@vvdries @gregorw @qmacro @martinfrick @martinstenzig @WouterLemaire @Marian_Zeis 
@showkath_naseem @LucasBorin @massimiliano_cardosi @rotem_puterman-sobe @MariamIdman

I referred these posts: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/btp-cap-how-to-connect-to-remote-services-locally-in-cap-application/ba-p/13550070

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-cap-hybrid-testing/ba-p/13556582

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/btp-cap-connect-to-remote-service-locally-hybrid/qaq-p/12662393

entry.title: Generate CAP Project in BAS with Error @sap/hdi-deploy@5.4.2 Not Match
entry.content:
Today, I will generate CAP project via create from template wizard but error @SAP/hdi-deploy@5.4.2 not match

and can't build mta file as picture below.

entry.title: BAS Application Modeler broken with Fiori tools 1.17.1
entry.content:
Hello all,

Since the new version 1.17.1 of Fiori tools, the Application Modeler is broken and it it not possible to migrate old projects. After starting the migration, there is a message in the bottom right corner:

I used VS Code to reproduce and switching back to 1.17.0, the migration can be executed. Is there a possibility to revert the Fiori tools in BAS till the bug is fixed?

Thanks,
Thomas

entry.title: SAP Fiori tools extensions pack issue for migrating neo apps from web ide
entry.content:
Issue with all the apps both in BAS and VS tool for migrating the apps from the neo web ide.

Do any one have the solution how to resolve this.

entry.title: Configured Destination using CAP service and its not showing in BAS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Am creating my first Fiori app in BAS using CAPM service as backend. I have created a destination using CAPM service. First i have tried creating destination using https://XXX.hana.ondemand.com but got 404 error. Later https://XXX.hana.ondemand.com/odata/v4/XX tried using this url and connection response is 200.

But either of the ways am not able to see the destination while creating Fiori application. Could you please help me with this issue.

Regards, Sai Ram Dinesh Pallapotu

entry.title: CAP Fiori app giving 404 error in BTP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on Fiori app, am trying to create a Fiori app inside the CAP project and created successfully. In local it's working fine but after deploying whole mta file, app is visible in HTML5 application section but showing 404 error. After modifying somethings, Business Solution column of Fiori app changed to CAPM project name and it's working fine for the first time. Later Business Solution field data is changed to Fiori app name and stopped working. Not getting what's happening here.

Could you please me help with this.

Regards,

Sai Ram Dinesh

entry.title: RAP List Report aggregation missing only in deployed version
entry.content:
I've created an RAP APP ( on adt side ) to show an list report fiori app with option to navigate for detail ( also a list report ).

I neeed to have totals and subtotals so I put the anotaion @Aggregation.default: #SUM in the projection view.
When I preview the APP using Service bindiing preview option I've the totals:

When I go to details ( using associations ) I also have de totals:

After I deploy the APP using BAS I lost totals in the main view:

So I assumed that some limitation in BAS side. But if I go to the details ( in the deployed app ), I have the totals:

Since I have parameters, I'm using oDataV2 protocol.

I saw in Browser that the request that doesn't have totals have in the select all fieds, like:

GET ZC_COMPT_MAIN(p_date_from=datetime%272015-03-26T00%3a00%3a00%27,p_date_to=datetime%272025-04-04T00%3a00%3a00%27)/Results?sap-client=100&$select=Supplier,VATRegistration,tipoproc,SumAmountInCompanyCodeCurrency,DispCodeCurrency,SumTaxBaseAmountInCoCodeCrcy,SumTaxAmountInCoCodeCrcy,SumNetAmount,SumPurchaseRequisitionPrice,computo,ID&$filter=((((CompanyCode%20eq%20%27I001%27))%20and%20((Supplier%20eq%20%272018%27))))&$orderby=Supplier%20asc&$top=120&$inlinecount=allpages HTTP/1.1

The request that has totals, just select the fields with values:


GET ZC_COMPT_MAIN(p_date_from=datetime%272015-03-26T00%3a00%3a00%27,p_date_to=datetime%272025-04-04T00%3a00%3a00%27)/Results?sap-client=100&$select=SumAmountInCompanyCodeCurrency,DispCodeCurrency,SumTaxBaseAmountInCoCodeCrcy,SumTaxAmountInCoCodeCrcy,SumNetAmount,SumPurchaseRequisitionPrice,computo&$filter=((((CompanyCode%20eq%20%27I001%27))%20and%20((Supplier%20eq%20%272018%27))))&$top=100&$inlinecount=allpages HTTP/1.1

 

Can you please help me identifying what could be the problem? Is there an option to afect the OData request ? Thanks

entry.title: BAS in BTP Trial Account is NOT getting STARTED
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Greetings!

Yesterday, while working on the BAS (Business Application Studio) in my SAP BTP Trial account (1263e22btrial) suddenly the BAS stopped responding. I was using an incognito window for my BTP login and I thought that I might have been logged out from BTP so I refreshed the BTP Cockpit and the corresponding BAS link (https://1263e22btrial.us10cf.trial.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/index.html). At the time I tried to STOP and START my SAP Fiori type (Fiori_Dev) Dev Space (ID: ws-lkc4q) in which I was working but it was NOT coming to STOPPED status and was just showing STOPPING instead. So, I restarted the browser and tried in a new incognito window again but this time I was NOT able to set it to START state. And since then it just shows STARTING incessantly whenever I am trying to start this Dev Space. Please refer the attached screenshot for further details.

Since I encountered this issue yesterday I have tried to set my SAP Fiori type (Fiori_Dev) Dev Space to START state in different machines and in different browsers (Chrome and Edge) but still this Dev Space (ID: ws-lkc4q) is inaccessible to me. Also, I tried to create another Dev Space (Mobile_Dev) of SAP Mobile App type (ID: ws-5gv69) and I am able to start and stop this Dev Space without any issues.

Please help me in resolving this issue and setting my Fiori_Dev Dev Space (ID: ws-lkc4q) to START state at the earliest possible as the last interval of my trial extension will expire in next 7 days.

Thanks,

Rohit V.

entry.title: Issue with connection to postgresql from SAP CAP app in BAS
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

when i run the command cds deploy, i get the following error:

$ cds deploy --tunnel-address localhost:5432
/> deployment to localhost:5432 failed

TimeoutError: ResourceRequest timed out

 

I do have the ssh tunnel running on port 5432, the PostgreSQL instance is working fine when i connect to it from my local machine via DBeaver but for some reason i can not deploy changes, when inspecting the env via "cds env" i do see the correct username, password and database name, so i really dont understand why i can not cds deploy my tables.

entry.title: Issue in enabling the Horizontal scrollbar in the Sap Smart table
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I got a requirement to enable the horizontal scrollbar for the smart table and columns & values should not wrap inside the smart table ? 

Can someone suggest how can i achieve it ? tableType of the smart table is "Table".

I have tried keeping the smart table inside the scroll container but nothing happening but when i keep the table which is inside the Smart table in scroll container its coming as below

Please can someone throw light on this.

entry.title: DEPRECATED: req._queryOptions what to use to extract from query parameters?
entry.content:
Hello CAPlers,

I have productive use case to implement pagination with $skip, $top, $count from query parameter.

I must use functions which returns array of array of entity. Any pagination examples would be great to refer how the slicing logic is handled.
What should I use to make it work? 

When I use:

const { $top, $skip } = req._queryOptions || {};
I got 
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
DEPRECATED: req._queryOptions
Configuration req._queryOptions is deprecated and will be removed in upcoming releases!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Is there any documentation where it is mentioned? or maybe I missed
https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/events#cds-request

Please support. Thanks.

entry.title: BAS service missing in BTP subaccount entitlements
entry.content: In the global account, I created a sub-account with Сloud Foundry, but when trying to add BAS to the account's entitlements, there is no option to select Busines Application Studio (screenshot below). What could be the reason?

entry.title: SAP Business Application Studio - HANA Native objects (CV)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement to create SAP SAP HANA native models like Calculation views etc. in SAP Business Application studio, but my S/4 HANA system is on-premise.

Do you think it is possible to connect SAP BAS(BTP) to on-premise SAP S/4 HANA and create modelling artifacts? What are pros & cons to this solution? Client is not interested for any other cloud based Analytics solution.

 

Thanks

Subodh

entry.title: Business Application Studio - Adding test cases learning unit - test.js
entry.content:
Hello,

I am learning ABAP coding.
The current unit is Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP/Adding Test Cases
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp/adding-test-cases
When I test the application there are errors. I tried to install components, went back to see if I had missed something.

I found the test.js code might be the issue.
The test.js code can be found in two places.
1 - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/add-test-cases.html
When I copy the first, there are 3 errors.
2 - https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2023-XP260/tree/main/exercises/Add%20Test%20Cases
When I copy the second, there are 2 errors.
Errors are attached.

I tried to figure out what might be the issue but I haven't found it yet.
Any idea?

Thanks
Laszlo

entry.title: Business Application Studio in BTP - Unable to connect to ABAP backend
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

Since yesterday (Tuesday) I have been unable to make a connection to an OnPremise ABAP (S/4HANA) system, when testing a UI5 app. The setup has been working for a long time, but now I cannot connect. When I start my UI5 app, the $metadata call made by the UI5 framework fails. I have also tried using a curl statement directly in the Terminal, and that does not work either.

I have tried testing for different customers, thereby using different subaccounts, SAP Cloud Connector and backend systems. I have also tested both in eu10 and eu20.

However when using the wizard to create a new application with the basic template delivered by SAP, I am able to make a call to the backend to extract the list of OData services. So the connection is technically working, I just cannot use it for testing my application in BAS.

Does anybody else have similar problems ?

Thanks and best regard,

Søren Hansen

entry.title: I want to use HTML5 Vocabulary RowSpanForDuplicateValues ​​feature. Please tell me how.
entry.content:
I want to use HTML5 Vocabulary RowSpanForDuplicateValues ​​feature. Please tell me how.

 
<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem" >
                <Collection>                    
                    <Record Type="UI.DataField">                                      
                        <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="CategoryID"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>category}"/>                    
                        <Annotation Term="HTML5.RowSpanForDuplicateValues" Bool="true"/>
 .............................................
 
I configured it as above, but there is no change on the screen.

 

===============================

HTML5 Vocabulary

Namespace: com.sap.vocabularies.HTML5.v1

Terms for HTML5

The HTML5 vocabulary provides rendering hints for HTML5 clients

Terms

Term Type Description

CssDefaultsCssDefaultsTypeCSS definitions that may be used as defaults
This term can applied to e.g. UI.DataFieldAbstract records
LinkTargetLinkTargetTypeWhere to open a link for the annotated URL
When the UI contains a link to the URL, it shall open as specified by this annotation. This can be achieved, for example, by giving the UI5 sap.m.Link element a corresponding target property. Applicability of this term is governed by Validation.ApplicableTerms annotations.
RowSpanForDuplicateValues (Experimental)TagThe annotated data field might use a rowSpan for adjacent duplicate values if used in a table.
In order to achieve a good user experience the respective columns should be sorted. Applicability of this term is governed by Validation.ApplicableTerms annotations.
